name: chorus
description: Chorus AI-DLC collaboration platform plugin for Claude Code. Automates session lifecycle, provides MCP tools for PM/Developer/Admin workflows, and enables multi-agent team observability.

enableProposalReviewer.title: Enable Proposal Reviewer
enableProposalReviewer.description: Prompt the agent to spawn chorus:proposal-reviewer after submitting a proposal. Adds independent quality review but increases token usage.

enableTaskReviewer.title: Enable Task Reviewer
enableTaskReviewer.description: Prompt the agent to spawn chorus:task-reviewer after submitting a task for verification. Adds independent code review but increases token usage.

maxProposalReviewRounds.title: Max Proposal Review Rounds
maxProposalReviewRounds.description: Maximum review rounds before escalating to human. Set to 0 for unlimited.

maxTaskReviewRounds.title: Max Task Review Rounds
maxTaskReviewRounds.description: Maximum review rounds before escalating to human. Set to 0 for unlimited.
